troubleshooting_results.countermeasure: 拆卸清洗噴嘴，去除漆渣結塊

troubleshooting_results.state_description: 塗料殘留在噴嘴孔徑累積，導致噴幅縮小或不均

troubleshooting_results.countermeasure: 校正噴嘴與工件 TCP Z 軸距離

troubleshooting_results.state_description: 實際噴幅與目標值偏差超過 ±10mm

troubleshooting_results.state_name: 伺服馬達負載過高/磨損
troubleshooting_results.state_description: 減速機磨損導致伺服馬達電流與扭矩負載上升，長期超標將導致故障
troubleshooting_results.countermeasure: 定期潤滑伺服馬達與減速機
